controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (rrbs) (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' or 'rrbs' and individually as a 'bank' or 'rrb)
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (RRBs)
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' or 'RRBs' and individually as a
'bank' or 'RRB).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (rrbs) (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' or 'rrbs' and individually as a 'bank' or 'rrb)

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'credit risk' shall mean the potential that a bank's borrower or counterparty may fail to meet its oblig
controls.control_description:
In this chapter, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Credit risk' shall mean the potential that a bank's borrower or counterparty may
fail to meet its obligations in accordance with agreed terms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'credit risk' shall mean the potential that a bank's borrower or counterparty may fail to meet its oblig

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned under the applicable accounting standards
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Deferred Tax Assets (DTA)' and 'Deferred Tax Liabilities (DTL)' shall have the
same meaning as assigned under the applicable Accounting Standards;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned under the applicable accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45u(a) of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Derivative' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45U(a) of
the RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45u(a) of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined under reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - cash reserve ratio and statutory liquidity ratio) directions, 202
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined under reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - cash reserve ratio and statutory liquidity ratio) directions, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined under sub- section 2(72) of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
and
(5) 'Public financial institution' shall have the same meaning as defined under sub-
section 2(72) of the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined under sub- section 2(72) of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the regional rura
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the Regional Rural Banks Act, 1976 and rules
/ regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the regional rura

controls.control_objective: To ensure to maintain a minimum capital to risk weighted assets ratio (crar) of 9 per cent on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description:
An RRB is required to maintain a minimum Capital to Risk Weighted Assets Ratio
(CRAR) of 9 per cent on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to maintain a minimum capital to risk weighted assets ratio (crar) of 9 per cent on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure compute crar in the following manner: eligible capital funds crar = total risk weighted assets (rwas) where, rwas shall be calculated as specified und
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall compute CRAR in the
following manner:
Eligible capital funds
CRAR =
Total Risk Weighted Assets (RWAs)
Where, RWAs shall be calculated as specified under paragraph 15 below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compute crar in the following manner: eligible capital funds crar = total risk weighted assets (rwas) where, rwas shall be calculated as specified und

controls.control_objective: To ensure consist of tier 1 and tier 2 capital
controls.control_description:
The capital funds for capital adequacy purpose shall consist of Tier 1 and Tier 2
capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consist of tier 1 and tier 2 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure make provisions for deferred tax liabilities (dtl) on the special reserve created under section 36(1)(viii) of income tax act, 1961
controls.control_description:
The elements of Tier 1 Capital are:
Note - In terms of Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Financial
Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025, a RRB shall
make provisions for Deferred Tax Liabilities (DTL) on the Special Reserve
created under section 36(1)(viii) of Income Tax Act, 1961.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make provisions for deferred tax liabilities (dtl) on the special reserve created under section 36(1)(viii) of income tax act, 1961

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in tier 1 capital
controls.control_description:
Such reserves
are part of free reserves and may be included in Tier 1 Capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure also not qualify as tier 2 capital
controls.control_description:
Note: Revaluation Reserves, which do not qualify as Tier 1 Capital,
shall also not qualify as Tier 2 Capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also not qualify as tier 2 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure choose to reckon revaluation reserves in tier 1 capital or tier 2 capital at its discretion
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to choose to reckon revaluation reserves in tier 1 capital or tier 2 capital at its discretion

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 7 per cent of rwas after the regulatory adjustment / deduction as per paragraph 11 below
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 7 per cent of rwas after the regulatory adjustment / deduction as per paragraph 11 below

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to 1
controls.control_description:
(2) Of the minimum Tier 1 Capital of 7 per cent, the PDIs shall be limited to 1.5 per
cent of the RWAs;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reckoned as tier 1 capital
controls.control_description:
and
(3) Any additional amount raised through PDIs over and above the 1.5 per cent of
the RWAs shall also be reckoned as Tier 1 Capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reckoned as tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure an rrb complies with the minimum tier 1 capital of 7 per cent of rwas before reckoning such additional amounts
controls.control_description:
Provided that an RRB complies with the minimum Tier 1 Capital of 7 per cent of
RWAs before reckoning such additional amounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an rrb complies with the minimum tier 1 capital of 7 per cent of rwas before reckoning such additional amounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure reduce pension related unamortised expenditure from tier 1 capital
controls.control_description:
The following items shall be fully deducted from Tier 1 Capital:
Note: An RRB, implementing the RRB (Employee) Pension Scheme
with effect from November 1, 1993, and amortising expenditure on
account of revision in pension over the period not exceeding five years
(beginning from financial year ending March 31, 2025), shall not
reduce pension related unamortised expenditure from Tier 1 Capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reduce pension related unamortised expenditure from tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure also refer to reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025 in this regard
controls.control_description:
Note - An RRB shall also refer to Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025 in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also refer to reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025 in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully recognised in the calculation of tier 1 capital (i
controls.control_description:
(iii) Defined Benefit Pension Fund liabilities, as included on the Balance Sheet,
shall be fully recognised in the calculation of Tier 1 Capital (i.e., Tier 1
Capital cannot be increased through derecognising these liabilities).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully recognised in the calculation of tier 1 capital (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deducted in the calculation of tier 1 capital
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deducted in the calculation of tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be deducted from tier 1 capital:
controls.control_description:
(iv) The following items, if identified in the course of supervisory inspection, or
otherwise, shall also be deducted from Tier 1 Capital:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be deducted from tier 1 capital:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be admitted as tier 2 capital up to a maximum of 1
controls.control_description:
The elements of Tier 2 Capital are as under:
(1) General provisions and loss reserves
General provisions and loss reserves shall be admitted as Tier 2 Capital up to a
maximum of 1.25 per cent of the total RWAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be admitted as tier 2 capital up to a maximum of 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure an rrb has taken adequate care to ensure that sufficient provisions have been made to meet all known losses and foreseeable potential losses before co
controls.control_description:
Provided that an RRB has taken adequate care to ensure that sufficient
provisions have been made to meet all known losses and foreseeable potential
losses before considering any amount of general provision as part of Tier 2
Capital;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an rrb has taken adequate care to ensure that sufficient provisions have been made to meet all known losses and foreseeable potential losses before co

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the entire amount of balance in ifr in tier 2 capital
controls.control_description:
(2) Investment Fluctuation Reserve (IFR)
A RRB may include the entire amount of balance in IFR in Tier 2 Capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the entire amount of balance in ifr in tier 2 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to a maximum of 100 percent of total tier 1 capital for the purpose of compliance with the capital adequacy framework
controls.control_description:
The total Tier 2 Capital shall be limited to a maximum of 100 percent of total
Tier 1 Capital for the purpose of compliance with the capital adequacy
framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be limited to a maximum of 100 percent of total tier 1 capital for the purpose of compliance with the capital adequacy framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be multiplied with respective risk weights, representing degree of credit risk, to produce risk adjusted value of on-balance sheet and off- balance sh
controls.control_description:
Value of all on-balance sheet items and credit equivalent of all off-balance sheet
items [calculated by multiplying the face value of an item with credit conversion
factors (CCF)] shall be multiplied with respective risk weights, representing
degree of credit risk, to produce risk adjusted value of on-balance sheet and off-
balance sheet items.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be multiplied with respective risk weights, representing degree of credit risk, to produce risk adjusted value of on-balance sheet and off- balance sh

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken into account for computing crar
controls.control_description:
The aggregate RWAs shall be taken into account for
computing CRAR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken into account for computing crar

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract risk weight of 102
controls.control_description:
2.5
Note - Investment in securities where payment of interest or repayment of principal is guaranteed by State Government and which has become a non-performing investment, shall attract risk weight of 102.5 percent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract risk weight of 102

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to the claims on the reserve bank, deposit insurance and credit guarantee corporation (dicgc, credit guarantee fund trust for micro and sma
controls.control_description:
5 Investment in other approved securities where payment of interest and repayment of principal is not guaranteed by Central / State Government
22.5
6 Investments in Government guaranteed securities of government undertakings which do not form part of the approved market borrowing program
22.5
Note -
The risk weight applicable to claims on central government exposures shall also apply to the claims on the Reserve Bank, Deposit Insurance and Credit Guarantee Corporation (DICGC, Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE) and Credit Risk Guarantee Fund Trust for Low Income Housing (CRGFTLIH) and individual schemes under National Credit Guarantee Trustee Company Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to the claims on the reserve bank, deposit insurance and credit guarantee corporation (dicgc, credit guarantee fund trust for micro and sma

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable in respect of exposures guaranteed under any existing or future schemes launched by cgtmse, crgftlih and ncgtc satisfying the conditions
controls.control_description: The risk weight of zero percent as mentioned above shall be applicable in respect of exposures guaranteed under any existing or future schemes launched by CGTMSE, CRGFTLIH and NCGTC satisfying the conditions mentioned in paragraph 15(5).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable in respect of exposures guaranteed under any existing or future schemes launched by cgtmse, crgftlih and ncgtc satisfying the conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract appropriate risk-weight
controls.control_description: The balance outstanding in excess of guaranteed portion shall attract appropriate risk-weight.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract appropriate risk-weight

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an exposure on the lc issuing bank and assigned risk weight as is normally applicable to inter-bank exposures
controls.control_description:
2 Loans guaranteed by State Governments 20
3 State Government guaranteed loan which has become a NPAs 100
4 Loans granted to public sector undertakings of Government of India 100
5 Loans granted to public sector undertakings of State Governments 100
6 Others including PFIs 100
For the purpose of credit exposure, bills purchased / discounted / negotiated under LC (where payment to the beneficiary is not under reserve) shall be treated as an exposure on the LC issuing bank and assigned risk weight as is normally applicable to inter-bank exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an exposure on the lc issuing bank and assigned risk weight as is normally applicable to inter-bank exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as exposure on the borrower constituent
controls.control_description: Bills negotiated under LCs under reserve, bills purchased / discounted / negotiated without LCs, shall be reckoned as exposure on the borrower constituent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as exposure on the borrower constituent

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract a risk weight appropriate to the borrower
controls.control_description: Accordingly, the exposure shall attract a risk weight appropriate to the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract a risk weight appropriate to the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be risk weighted at 100 per cent 100 15 education loans 100 16 loans extended against primary / collateral security of shares / debentures 125 17 adva
controls.control_description:
Note - Entire loan amount shall be risk weighted at 100 per cent 100
15 Education loans 100
16 Loans extended against primary / collateral security of shares / debentures 125
17 Advances covered by DICGC / ECGC
Note - The risk weight of 50 per cent shall be limited to the amount guaranteed and not the entire outstanding balance in the accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be risk weighted at 100 per cent 100 15 education loans 100 16 loans extended against primary / collateral security of shares / debentures 125 17 adva

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry risk weight of 100 per cent
controls.control_description: In other words, the outstanding in excess of the amount guaranteed, shall carry risk weight of 100 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry risk weight of 100 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assigned zero risk weight
controls.control_description:
18 Advances for term deposits, life policies, NSCs, IVPs and KVPs where adequate margin is available 0
19 Loans and advances granted by a RRB to its staff 20
20 Takeout finance
Notes: While calculating the aggregate of funded and non-funded exposure of a borrower for the purpose of assignment of risk weight, banks may 'net-off' against the total outstanding exposure of the borrower -
Note - Intangible assets and losses deducted from Tier 1 capital shall be assigned
zero risk weight.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assigned zero risk weight

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep capital charge equal to the actual exposure and will be subjected to supervisory scrutiny and suitable action
controls.control_description:
Further, in case of investment in securitisation exposures, an RRB
shall keep capital charge equal to the actual exposure and will be subjected to
supervisory scrutiny and suitable action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep capital charge equal to the actual exposure and will be subjected to supervisory scrutiny and suitable action

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract a credit conversion factor of 20 per cent
controls.control_description:
Instruments
(In percentage)
Direct credit substitutes, e.g., general guarantees of indebtedness
(including standby LCs serving as financial guarantees for loans and
securities) and acceptances (including endorsements with the character
of acceptance)
Note - In respect of borrowers having aggregate fund based working
capital limit of ₹150 crore and above from the banking system, the
undrawn portion of cash credit / overdraft limits sanctioned, irrespective
of whether unconditionally cancellable or not, shall attract a credit
conversion factor of 20 per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract a credit conversion factor of 20 per cent

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully satisfied that the risk exposure is, in fact, on the other bank
controls.control_description:
Note - In these cases, an RRB shall be fully satisfied that the risk
exposure is, in fact, on the other bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully satisfied that the risk exposure is, in fact, on the other bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be capped at a notional level arrived by treating the entire exposure as unguaranteed
controls.control_description:
10 Aggregate outstanding foreign exchange contracts of original maturity*
Note - The maximum capital
charge shall be capped at a
notional level arrived by
treating the entire exposure
as unguaranteed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be capped at a notional level arrived by treating the entire exposure as unguaranteed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be capped at a notional level arrived by treating note -
controls.control_description:
Note - The maximum capital
charge shall be capped at a
notional level arrived by treating
Note -
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be capped at a notional level arrived by treating note -

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish an annual return to the respective regional office of national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard), indicating capital funds a
controls.control_description:
A RRB shall furnish an annual return to the respective Regional Office of National
Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD), indicating capital funds
and risk assets ratio, in the format given in Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish an annual return to the respective regional office of national bank for agriculture and rural development (nabard), indicating capital funds a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be signed by two officials who are authorised to sign the statutory returns submitted to the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
The return shall be signed
by two officials who are authorised to sign the statutory returns submitted to the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be signed by two officials who are authorised to sign the statutory returns submitted to the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished as soon as the annual accounts are finalised
controls.control_description:
The statement shall be furnished as soon as the annual accounts
are finalised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished as soon as the annual accounts are finalised

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these directions,
instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or Directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
<image>
these Directions, the Reserve Bank̥ may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank
shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done only for advances collateralised by cash margins or deposits and in respect of assets where provisions for depreciation for bad and doubtful d
controls.control_description: Netting may be done only for advances collateralised by cash margins or deposits and in respect of assets where provisions for depreciation for bad and doubtful debts have been made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done only for advances collateralised by cash margins or deposits and in respect of assets where provisions for depreciation for bad and doubtful d

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assigned zero risk weight
controls.control_description:
Intangible assets for which losses have been deducted
from Tier 1 Capital shall be assigned zero risk weight.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assigned zero risk weight

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included by way of a footnote
controls.control_description:
Risk weight
value
VII Other assets (including branch adjustments, non-banking assets, etc.)
Total
* Provision, if any, made for depreciation in investments in Government and other approved securities may be included by way of a footnote.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included by way of a footnote

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated by way of footnote
controls.control_description: * Provisions held, either general or specific, for bad and doubtful debts may be indicated by way of footnote.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated by way of footnote
